items.disposition_reason: Reviewer accepted the read-only selector clarification for offline fixture preview only.

proposed_fields.label: Permit search input
proposed_fields.validation_message: Search text is required before a read-only fixture preview can continue.
proposed_fields.redaction_policy: Redact owner names, account identifiers, email addresses, phone numbers, and street-unit details.
proposed_fields.selector_confidence_note: Scoped selector retains stable fixture attribute and input name; confidence high.

items.rollback_note: Discard this preview output; no inactive fixture file was changed.

items.disposition_reason: Reviewer blocked upload-control preview because upload actions remain consequential.

proposed_fields.label: Correction upload control blocked preview
proposed_fields.validation_message: Correction uploads are excluded from inactive read-only patch preview.
proposed_fields.redaction_policy: Do not store uploaded files, document names, private record values, or browser artifacts.
proposed_fields.selector_confidence_note: Selector is recorded only to carry the blocked action forward; no fixture patch may be applied.

blocked_actions.reason: Correction upload remains blocked until attended exact-confirmation guardrails are separately reviewed.

items.rollback_note: Keep the upload fixture unchanged and carry the block into the next reviewer queue.
